description: Give your furry friend the freedom to explore the outdoors safely with the AmazonBasics Tie-Out Cable. Suitable for dogs up to 60 pounds, this 25-foot cable provides plenty of room for your pet to roam while keeping them secure. The durable steel construction with a weather-resistant coating ensures long-lasting performance in any environment. Swivel clips on both ends help prevent tangling and make attaching to a stake or collar quick and easy. Perfect for camping trips, backyard time, or outdoor gatherings, this tie-out cable offers peace of mind and joyful experiences for you and your dog.
